issues.title: Remove moonshot and qianfan model
issues.body:
These models have moved to https://github.com/orgs/spring-ai-community/repositories

The links to these models in the reference documentation should point to the new locations.

comments.body:
Closing this as complete as the new repos are: 

https://github.com/spring-ai-community/qianfan
https://github.com/spring-ai-community/moonshot
